summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Espace Maxo restaurant & VR gaming application. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate), frontend integration working correctly, complete booking flow tested successfully including Stripe payment integration.
passed_tests: ✅ All 13 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
✅ Menu page loads with 8 menu items and category filtering
✅ Games page loads with 2 game cards (VR & Racing Simulator)
✅ Homepage hero section and features display correctly
✅ Calendar date selection and time slot loading
✅ Booking summary with correct pricing (1,500 FCFA + 500 FCFA fee)
✅ Responsive design and cyberpunk styling working
✅ All required data-testid attributes present for testing
